---
title: "Macro II - Fluctuations - Part II"
listing:
  - id: sample-listings
    type: table
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    contents: 
      - slides/session_*/index.qmd
      # - slides/prep_*/wip.qmd
    sort: date
    fields: [date, title]

  - id: tutorials-listings
    type: table
    filter-ui: false
    sort-ui: false
    field-display-names: {title: "Tutoriels"}
    contents: 
      - tutorials/session_1/index.qmd
      - tutorials/session_2/index.qmd
      # - slides/prep_*/wip.qmd
    fields: [title]
---
 
Lien pour les tutoriels: [![Notebook tutorials](https://img.shields.io/badge/notebook-link-e2d610?logo=jupyter&logoColor=white)](https://notebook.link/public-project/7a0744ba-7b15-42e5-9360-68028cb8b8f9/lab/ "Open tutorials notebook")

## Agenda des Cours

::: {#sample-listings}

:::

## Tutoriels

::: {#tutorials-listings}

:::
